beforeShellExecution.description: Security guardrails: block dangerous commands, protect sensitive files, audit trail
pre-commit-pii-scanner: block git commits containing SSN / email / phone PII (HHS / FedRAMP)
pre-commit-convention-checker: block git commits that violate hard Python/TypeScript conventions

beforeMCPExecution.description: Scope guard: block out-of-project filesystem access via MCP tools, audit trail

beforeReadFile.description: Secret protection: block production secrets, redact API keys, advisory messages for sensitive files

beforeSubmitPrompt.description: Prompt audit: log prompt metadata for session tracking

afterFileEdit.description: Quality enforcement: auto-format, convention checks, import validation, test patterns, a11y, TODO scanning
background-accessibility-monitor: advisory WCAG 2.1 AA / Section 508 scan on frontend edits (non-blocking)
stale-documentation-detector: warn when edited source has docs older than STALE_THRESHOLD_DAYS (non-blocking)

stop.description: Session wrap-up: git summary, test runner, coverage reporter, audit log finalization
background-test-runner: spawn scoped pytest / npm test for touched surfaces (non-blocking)
pr-auto-labeler: apply area/type labels to the branch's open PR via gh CLI (non-blocking)
